research.topic: Claude Code Plugin Marketplace - Publishing and Distribution
research.question: How are Claude Code plugins published, distributed, and submitted to the official marketplace?
research.findings: Complete analysis of the Claude Code plugin ecosystem including marketplace architecture, submission process, plugin structure, and distribution methods.
research.recommendation: For publishing to the official marketplace, use the submission forms at claude.ai/settings/plugins/submit or platform.claude.com/plugins/submit. For private/team distribution, create a custom marketplace hosted on GitHub. There is no auto-publish-on-GitHub-release mechanism built in, but version pinning via git refs and SHA enables release channel patterns.
